title: Additional Labels for Columns
excerpt: Hi, we normally use the column feature to tag clients, but we have reached the maximum number of labels. Can we have this added to at least like 100?

posts.author: jamesreli (James Camacho)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, we normally use the column feature to tag clients, but we have reached the maximum number of labels. Can we have this added to at least like 100?

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jamesreli !

Welcome to the community!

If you don’t mind me suggesting, but what I might do instead of using a Status column is begin to start a client database. You can do this by creating a board for clients and then making every client an item on that board. Then using the Connect Board column you can associate every client to your original board.

Check out this video that shows how to use the connect board column.

Hope this helps!
